data.title: Update project docs to reflect strengthened planning gates
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new planning gates.
**Why**: CLAUDE.md and config docs must accurately describe the feasibility-resolution gate, multi-epic scrutiny, prompt-alignment step, and new config keys.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section (scrutiny pipeline, feasibility-resolution, prompt alignment, bot-psychologist conditional dispatch). Document brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles in dso-config.conf. Update KNOWN-ISSUES.md if any issues discovered.
- OUT: New documentation files. Changes to the mechanisms themselves.

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the feasibility-resolution gate, multi-epic scrutiny with depth cap, and prompt-alignment step with bot-psychologist conditional dispatch
  ← Satisfies: all criteria (documentation accuracy)
- When this story is complete, dso-config.conf documents the brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles config key

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
